subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I am he whom Thou hast nurtured by the hands of Thy grace, and guided unto Thy path, and caused to hearken unto Thy verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی انا الذی ربیتنی بایادی فضلک و هدیتنی الی صراطک و اسمعتنی آیاتک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
